title: Ord Janon

{{Quote|By reading the spurious reports from Coruscant regarding our withdrawal from such temporary worlds as Raxus Prime and Ord Janon, the Republic would have its citizenry believe we are on the run.|Dooku|<ref name="Shadowfeed">{{InsiderCite|65|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:2:14 Edition}}</ref>}}
'''Ord Janon''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Spinward sector/Legends|Spinward sector]]. At some point, Ord Janon served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was occupied by [[Confederacy military/Legends|military forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Description==
Ord Janon was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located within the [[Ord Janon system/Legends|Ord Janon system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Spinward sector/Legends|Spinward sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
Ord Janon served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]], which were established beginning with the [[Pius Dea Era]],<ref name="Ord" /> a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]]. [[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] later, during the conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Confederacy military/Legends|Confederate forces]] once had to [[Battle of Ord Janon (Clone Wars)|withdraw]] from Ord Janon, which they occupied at the time.<ref name="CSWE" />

[[File:OrdJanonAttack.png|thumb|right|200px|The Yuuzhan Vong invaders' path of advance included the conquest of the Ord Janon system.]]
During the war, Republic-controlled news media issued reports stating its [[Republic Military/Legends|military forces]] had conquered several critical Confederate strongholds. In response, in a [[22 BBY/Legends|14:2:14]] release of the [[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]] news and [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] program,<ref name="Shadowfeed" /> the [[Head of State/Legends|Confederacy's leader]],<ref name="TEA" /> [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], labeled Republic reports mentioning the Confederate withdrawal from the "temporary" worlds of Ord Janon and [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] as "spurious."<ref name="Shadowfeed" /> By [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Ord Janon was still considered to be a Confederate-aligned world.<ref name="FF139">{{FactFile|139|WOR 1-2|Worlds of the Clone Wars}}</ref>

The Ord Janon [[Star system/Legends|system]] was [[Attack on the Ord Janon system|attacked]] by the military forces of the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] during its [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at some point between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. The [[Star/Legends|star]] system was still under the control of those invaders by [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Janon was mentioned in "[[CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:2:14 Edition]]," an article written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] as an [[CIS Shadowfeed (Insider)|in-universe news report]]. It was published in the [[Star Wars Insider 65|sixty-fifth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine<ref name="Shadowfeed" /> on [[January 21]], [[2003]].<ref name="Insider date">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20021219.html|text=''Insider'' #65 & ''Bantha Tracks'' #2}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Janon system, and therefore the planet Ord Janon, in grid square N-2.<ref name="TEA" />
